files.Title: FireBlade.WinInteropUtils.ComponentObjectModel.Interfaces.IUnknown
files.Summary: Enables clients to get pointers to other interfaces on a given object through the method, and manage the existence of the object through the and methods. All other COM interfaces are inherited, directly or indirectly, from . Therefore, the three methods in are the first entries in the vtable for every interface.
